message:
fix(runtime): CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING return OK (4th fix), fix client_list test

CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING:
- Redis 7.2 returns OK for CLIENT TRACKING ON/OFF and CACHING YES/NO
- This has been reverted by concurrent agents 3 times — adding explicit
  PARITY RULE comments to prevent future regressions
- Conformance test core_client_conformance verifies this behavior
- Client libraries (redis-py, jedis, lettuce, ioredis) depend on OK

client_list test:
- Fix test isolation: use actual CLIENT ID instead of hardcoded "1"
  which fails when other tests increment the global ID counter first

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
